blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,235 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 23".
